summary: Sprint 6 passes all 4 required criteria. Build/typecheck 0; suite 3678 green (+11: 7 streaming + 4 digest). streaming = exactly 1 send + N edits on the SAME message id (injected EditTransport spy, N=2 and N=3); digest sets disable_notification via {silent:true}→GrammyTransport mapping; both route ONLY through the funnel (streaming via sendSafeForEdit/sendSafeEdit, digest via sendSafe — no direct transport calls in executable code); optional SendOptions 4th arg did NOT break Sprints 1-5 callers (outbound.test.ts green); grammy/editMessageText/message_id isolated to bot.ts; NO run/fleet/scheduler logic added (streaming consumes injected AsyncIterable); diff confined to src/telegram/, no new dep. sc-6-5 live do-bridge wiring left as a documented seam (manual, not required; nonGoal forbids run logic).
